---
title: Bootstrap Button Card
subtitle: "pure html"
format: html
---

> Pure Bootstrap Divs classed with _container-fluid, d-flex, align-items-stretch, flex-fill_

#### Pure Divs à la Bootstrap

```{=html}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="d-flex align-items-stretch w-100">
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <div class="input-group h-100">
        <span class="input-group-text" id="basic-addon1">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i> </span>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Search...">
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button class="btn btn-primary w-100" type="button">Action 1</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button class="btn btn-secondary w-100" type="button">Action 2</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button class="btn btn-warning w-100" type="button">RAZ</button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

#### With surrounding .card

```{=html}
<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="card shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-stretch w-100 custom-toolbar">
                
                <div class="flex-fill">
                    <div class="input-group h-100">
                        <span class="input-group-text bg-white">
                            <i class="bi bi-search text-muted"></i>
                        </span>
                        <input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Search or Type...">
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex-fill">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary w-100" type="button">
                        <i class="bi bi-plus-lg me-1"></i> Add New
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex-fill">
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" type="button">
                        <i class="bi bi-filter me-1"></i> Filters
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex-fill">
                    <button class="btn btn-success w-100" type="button">
                        <i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-down me-1"></i> Export
                    </button>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```
